Our name

Why we're called Diamond

A diamond doesn't make its own light — it takes what's already in the room and throws it back sharper. That's the whole idea behind the name. Everything on our shelves is just a tool. What you do with it, who you're spending your evening with, how you treat the person behind the counter — that's the part that actually shines.

We've run on that idea since 2019, across two shops in the Dayton area. Come in as you are, leave a little brighter than you walked in.

What we carry

Shop by category

A real selection, not a shelf of the same three brands. Stop in — if we don't have it out, we probably have it in back.

Vaping & Devices

Disposable vapes, mod & pod devices, tanks, coils, e-liquid, salt nicotine, vaporizers, nectar collectors, dry herb & concentrate vapes, 510-thread batteries

Glass & Accessories

Hand pipes, rigs, glass attachments & accessories, cleaners, grinders, rolling trays, ashtrays

THC & Cannabis

THC-A vapes, pre-rolls, flower, concentrates, gummies, mushroom gummies

Kratom

Kratom powder, capsules, and extract shots

Cigars

Cigars, cigar cutters & accessories

Tobacco

Cigarettes, cigarillos, wraps, rolling papers, tobacco bags & tubes

Hookah & Shisha

Hookahs, hookah accessories, shisha, natural & quick-light charcoal

Lifestyle & Extras

Incense & cones, sprays, air fresheners, candles, mugs, exotic snacks & drinks
